title: Assassin's Craft Chronicles
description: Dive into Minecraft with the "Assassin's Craft Chronicles". In early access, experience iconic outfits and weapons from the series. Items currently in Creative tab; crafting recipes coming soon. Assassin's Creed
body:
Assassin's Creed Mod for Minecraft - Early Access

Dive into the rich world of "Assassin's Creed" right within Minecraft! This mod brings iconic outfits, weapons, locations, and mechanics from the acclaimed series into your favorite sandbox game. Whether you're parkouring across rooftops or engaging in stealthy assassinations, the spirit of the Brotherhood awaits you.

🔷 Features (Current & Upcoming):

  • Outfits & Capes: Authentic Assassin outfits from various eras.
  • Weapons: A diverse arsenal of weapons.
  • Locations: Viewpoint synchronization and hideouts to explore. [not implemented yet]

🔶 Accessing Mod Items:

Currently, all items and features of the mod can only be accessed through the Creative tab. We're actively working on introducing crafting recipes for all items. Stay tuned!

🔷 Early Access Notice:

This mod is still under active development. By joining this early access, you're becoming part of the development process.

🔷 We Need Your Help!

Your feedback is invaluable! Help shape this mod by:

  • Reporting bugs or issues.
  • Suggesting enhancements.
  • Sharing your experiences.

Together, we'll make this mod a true testament to the "Assassin's Creed" legacy.

🔷 Stay Updated:

Follow our updates and join our community for discussions and more.

Thank you for your support, and welcome to the Brotherhood!
